title: Video Producer
description:
In the era of ChatGPT & Creative X, the industry needs to redefine and reimagine itself. Our value proposition is still in the business of creativity, and the ideas need to better than ever. It's a combination of curation, creativity and controlled chaos.

Now about us - listed amongst Marketing Magazine's Creative Agencies of the Year, PROTOCOL is an agency built for the now and the new.

We're also known for our creative spin-off projects like fifty-two and ChillPills which has garnered significant media coverage.

We ran a specialty coffee place in the heart of Little India called Main Street Commissary @ 81 Rowell Road for five years, right below our agency offices.

We are looking for a Video Producer/Cinematographer that can support our subsidiary - UNMASTERED in creating stunning video content for the brands under our care.


JOB DESCRIPTION

The Video Producer will capture, edit, and produce video and other multimedia assets in order to drive in support of the agency and our respective clients.. The Video Producer will be required to have advanced skills in media capture and creative editing with a fine eye for storytelling.

DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Create and develop multimedia (audio/video) content for brand-led content videos, product marketing videos and other video format.s
  • Script, storyboard, budget, allocate resources, set deadlines and select optimal forms of media for projects
  • Work independently, as well as part of a team to establish project deliverables
  • Plan video shoots; scout, select and reserve shoot locations
  • Develop production schedules
  • Select and hire additional crew and talent; direct and coach talent; make transportation arrangements for crew, talent and equipment; and ensure all location power needs are met
  • Record and edit video and sound projects, including selecting program format for final output, capturing/importing media, organizing raw media, editing footage and sound files, creating and inserting static and motion graphics, titling, adding music/voice-over/sfx, media management and archiving project media
  • Manage video library
  • Evaluate analytics

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE & SKILLS REQUIRED

  • Video includes familiarity with professional cameras, prosumer camcorders, various HD and SD formats, preproduction/planning, studio and field production, lighting/grip, scriptwriting, storyboarding and photography.
  • Audio includes small format mixers, compression, EQ, effects processors, audio recording techniques for studio and field, multi-track and waveform editing.
  • Post-production entails digital video editing, still and motion graphics design, and video compression for multiple delivery platforms.
  • Must submit a Directors/Editors reel to be considered
  • Minimum 2 years professional directing & editing experience
  • Expert level knowledge of Adobe Creative applications (Premiere Pro, Photoshop, After Effects)
  • Expert level ability when using best in class cameras, audio gear & lighting techniques
  • Detail oriented with strong organizational skills
  • Constant development of skills and exploration of new techniques, and an ability to share skills with the team
  • Excellent communication skills, positive attitude & experience working with executive level clients

EDUCATION & TRAINING

  • Any combination of education and training which demonstrates the ability to perform the duties and responsibilities as described. A typical qualifying background would include relevant qualifications in telecommunication or video production.

postedCompany.description:
Listed amongst Marketing Magazine's Creative Agencies of the Year, PROTOCOL is a creative agency built for the social media era.


We are an award-winning agency working with global brands that are equally obsessed with living on the bleeding edge of culture.
